\section*{\color{primary}🎤 Artist Overview}
\subsectionrule
Vozz Rich electrifies the global dance scene as a Mexican-Californian producer/DJ blending Detroit house, Latin rhythms, and techno intensity into chart-topping dancefloor alchemy. 🌎 His signature fusion of underground rave energy with Latin percussion and big-room euphoria has generated:
\begin{itemize}
\item 24,778+ monthly Spotify listeners with 15\% monthly growth
\item Beatport Progressive House Top 50 placement (\textit{Butterflies Remix})
\item 729K+ LastFM listener footprint across 15 countries
\end{itemize}
Recent collaborations with L25, Kicevski, and Artsychoke demonstrate his versatility in crafting peak-time anthems with cross-continental appeal.

\section*{\color{primary}🎧 Discography Highlights (2024-2025)}
\subsectionrule
\subsection*{Original Productions}
\begin{itemize}
\item \textit{Breathless} (with L25) – Melodic house with Latin vocal hooks
\item \textit{House Ablaze} – Peak-time techno weapon
\item \textit{Mi Corazon Batalla} – Latin house fusion showcase

\end{itemize}
